name: California Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 small zucchini, cut into 1 x 1/4" sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the unbaked 9-inch pastry shell and chill.
2. Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. Drain the marinated artichoke hearts, reserving 2 tablespoons of the marinade. Cut the artichokes into halves.
4. Saute zucchini and onion in the reserved marinade for 5 minutes until tender.
5. Beat eggs in a medium bowl until foamy. Stir in cream, milk, salt, savory seasoning, and pepper.
6. Spoon the sauteed vegetables into the shell. Add artichoke halves. Sprinkle with cheese.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the filling.
8. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes. Lower heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 20 minutes until a knife inserted comes out clean.
9. Cool for 15 minutes before serving.
